name: Publish page — collapsible sections expand to reveal code

planSteps.description: Click the 'Install the OpenAI SDK' section heading button to expand it
A code block appears containing the text 'npm install openai'
Click the 'ChatDockWidget.tsx' section heading button to expand it
The expanded section reveals its code, showing the filename 'components/ChatDockWidget.tsx' in the code block header
